历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 1371→1182→729→699→706, showing a significant upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative increase of about 665 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 706, a slight decrease of 7 positions compared to 2024's 699, essentially stable; the university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province for Science/Physics Category was 63 in 2021, 71 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 61 in 2024, and 61 in 2025; in 2026, Physics Category has 23 students plus Medical Category 33 students, totaling 56, a decrease of 5 from 2025, a reduction of about 8.2%, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 10th consecutively in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, firmly among the top universities in the country; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative (involving teacher ethics and style public opinion incidents); Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure; no obvious historical abnormal admission records, maintaining a relatively high level of application attention; has 13 A-/A/A+ disciplines including Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A+, Electrical Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mathematics A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Business Administration A, and Marxist Theory A, with extremely outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science, and Electronic Information/Communication have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with continuously rising social application enthusiasm; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Jilin Province general college entrance examination is 110,868, with an estimated 79,936 in the Physics Category, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 80,421 in 2025, with the candidate scale basically stable; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province, not a local university; its enrollment proportion in Jilin Province's Science category is about 0.08% (56 students / total Physics Category candidates in the province), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 706, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 8.2% slightly easing competition, the university's top engineering strength and high major popularity attracting high-scoring candidates, and the basically stable total number of candidates; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 681, with a range of 599–763.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 713 → 683 → 610 → 505 → 565, showing an overall forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative forward movement of about 148 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 565, a backward movement of 60 places compared to 2024's 505, indicating a significant rebound; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Jilin Province was 8 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 13 in 2025; the 2026 history category plan is 12, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a reduction of about 7.7%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 10th consecutively in the Soft Science ranking, with top comprehensive strength, but liberal arts is not its core advantage; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative; Douyin popularity ranking is 24th (relatively hot); no obvious abnormal historical admission records; Law is rated A (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the most prominent liberal arts discipline at Xi'an Jiaotong University; Marxist Theory is rated A.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has high social popularity (recommended), Chinese Language/Literature major is recommended, Network and New Media is clearly discouraged; the estimated number of history category examinees in Jilin Province in 2026 is about 30,932, a slight decrease of about 0.4% from 31,071 in 2025, with a basically stable candidate pool; Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province, not a local university; its liberal arts enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 0.04% (12 students / total history category examinees in the province), which is cross-provincial enrollment, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 565, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 7.7% slightly easing competition, the relatively weaker liberal arts strength compared to engineering, the high popularity of Law major but overall limited appeal of liberal arts majors, and the basically stable total number of examinees; the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is about 534, with a range of 470–598.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 西安交通大学在吉林省医学类单独招生，2021-2025年最低录取位次分别为4808、17948、10474、9370、8977。2022年因护理学单独招生拉低整体位次至17948，2023年起医学类 招生结构优化，位次逐步回升至10474，2024年进一步升至9370，2025年微升至8977，呈现逐年趋紧态势。招生计划方面，2021年28人，2022年扩至43人，2023年44人，2024年回 调至40人，2025年维持40人。2026年计划大幅缩减至33人（缩招17.5%），其中新增普通临床医学（非5+3一体化）13人，同时护理学从10人减至6人，医学试验班（临床类）从15 人减至0人（不再单独招生），整体名额显著减少。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校（A类），综合实力稳居全国前列。其医学部（原西安医科大学）历史 悠久，临床医学、基础医学等学科实力雄厚，在东北地区享有较高声誉，是吉林省考生报考医学类专业的优质选择之一。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 近年来医学类专业报考热度持续攀升，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。西安交通大学医学部地处西安，虽非东北本地，但作为西北地区医学高地，对吉林省考生 吸引力稳定。2026年吉林省医学类招生规模有所缩减（从40人降至33人），尤其是护理学名额减少、临床类试验班取消，使得整体竞争进一步加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年西安交通大学在吉林省医学类最低录取位次约为8134名，波动区间为7727-8541名。受2026年招生计划大幅缩减17.5%影响，位 次较2025年（8977名）有所下降（更容易进），但近年医学热度持续上升趋势部分抵消了缩招效应，位次下降幅度有限。建议考生结合自身位次合理定位。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University enrolls medical students separately in Jilin Province. From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings were 4808, 17948, 10474, 9370, and 8977 respectively. In 2022, due to separate enrollment of nursing, the overall ranking dropped to 17948. Starting from 2023, the medical enrollment structure was optimized, and the ranking gradually recovered to 10474, further rising to 9370 in 2024, and slightly to 8977 in 2025, showing a tightening trend year by year. In terms of enrollment plans, there were 28 students in 2021, expanded to 43 in 2022, 44 in 2023, reduced to 40 in 2024, and maintained at 40 in 2025. The 2026 plan significantly reduces to 33 students (a 17.5% reduction), including 13 new regular clinical medicine (non-5+3 integrated) students, while nursing decreases from 10 to 6, and the medical experimental class (clinical) drops from 15 to 0 (no longer separately enrolled), with a notable overall reduction in slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a national Double First-Class construction university (Class A), with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical school (formerly Xi'an Medical University) has a long history, with strong disciplines such as clinical medicine and basic medicine, enjoying a high reputation in the Northeast region, making it a quality choice for Jilin candidates applying for medical majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has continued to rise, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being particularly competitive. Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical school is located in Xi'an, which, although not in the Northeast, serves as a medical highland in the Northwest region, maintaining stable attraction for Jilin candidates. In 2026, the medical enrollment scale in Jilin Province has been reduced (from 40 to 33 students), especially with fewer nursing slots and the cancellation of the clinical experimental class, further intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Xi'an Jiaotong University's medical category in Jilin Province in 2026 is approximately 8134, with a fluctuation range of 7727-8541. Due to the significant 17.5% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the ranking is lower (easier to enter) compared to 2025 (8977), but the continuous rise in medical popularity partially offsets the contraction effect, limiting the decline. Candidates are advised to position themselves based on their own rankings.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, aim for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safety. Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated) and Basic Medicine (National Top-Notch Plan) have the highest ranking requirements, requiring a ranking within 3000 for a good chance; Tier 2 experimental classes and regular clinical medicine require rankings around 3000-5300; Nursing has lower ranking requirements and can serve as a safety choice.
